html:
2026-0433
2026-05-08PS, EMCREmergency Management ActProvincial Emergency Financial Assistance Order No. 294, Northwest TerritoriesProvincial Emergency Financial Assistance Order No. 294 in order to (1) declare the natural disaster to be of concern to the federal government; and (2) authorize the provision of financial assistance to Northwest Territories with respect to interface fires that occurred in Northwest Territories, in August and September 2025.N/A
subject: Provincial Emergency Financial Assistance Order No. 294, Northwest Territories
precis: Provincial Emergency Financial Assistance Order No. 294 in order to (1) declare the natural disaster to be of concern to the federal government; and (2) authorize the provision of financial assistance to Northwest Territories with respect to interface fires that occurred in Northwest Territories, in August and September 2025.
